records.question: Which users named Helen have reviewed the item titled avocado?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE item.title = 'avocado' AND useracct.name = 'Helen'
records.pred_sql: select useracct.u_id from useracct join review on useracct.u_id = review.u_id join item on review.i_id = item.i_id where lower(useracct.name) like '%helen%' and lower(item.title) like '%avocado%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need users named Helen who have reviewed an item titled avocado. We'll join useracct, review, and item, filter by name and title, and select useracct.u_id.

records.question: Which user accounts have written reviews with a rank of at least 1?

JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE review.rank >= 1

JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE item.title = 'shampoo' AND review.rating = 5 AND useracct.name = 'Helen'
records.pred_sql: select useracct.u_id from useracct join review on useracct.u_id = review.u_id join item on review.i_id = item.i_id where lower(useracct.name) like '%helen%' and lower(item.title) like '%shampoo%' and review.rating = 5 limit 5;

records.question: Which users named Mark have given a rank 2 review with a rating of at most 5 for the item titled orange?

SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE useracct.name = 'Mark' AND review.rank = 2 AND item.title = 'orange' AND review.rating <= 5
records.pred_sql: select useracct.u_id from useracct join review on useracct.u_id = review.u_id join item on review.i_id = item.i_id where lower(useracct.name) like '%mark%' and lower(item.title) like '%orange%' and review.rank = 2 and review.rating <= 5 limit 5;
records.thought: We need users named Mark who reviewed an item titled 'orange' with rank 2 and rating <= 5. We'll join useracct, review, and item, and filter accordingly.
